emotional_tone: Objective, rigid, authoritative, and functional. Focuses on clarity and truth to eliminate bottlenecks.

headings.usage: Use Outfit for all display and heading text.

body.usage: Use IBM Plex Sans for all dense data, tables, and standard copy.

labels.usage: Overlines, table headers, and tiny meta-data.

colors.philosophy: Color is Function Only. 95% of the UI should be monochrome. Color exists only to guide action.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Dense and compact spacing for data clarity. The 'Control Room' grid protocol.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Grid items should have border-r and border-b where applicable to create a technical table-like structure.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Flat solid surfaces. NEVER use Glassmorphism for this app. Use crisp 1px borders to separate sections.

components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow by default. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.
components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-none). High contrast. Primary actions use #002FA7, Escalations use #FF2400.
components.tables: Dense rows, monochrome headers, strict left-alignment. Explicit bottom borders per row.
components.badges: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-sm). Strict functional coloring (Red = CEO, Blue = Product, Green = Auto-Approve).
components.navigation: Visible sidebar or top navigation with a hard bottom/right border. Solid background. Do not hide behind hamburger on desktop.

interactions.hover: Explicitly set hover:text-white or contrasting color. E.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white.
interactions.focus: High contrast ring: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:ring-offset-1 focus:outline-none.
interactions.transitions: Use specific properties: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease.

testing.required_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based). e.g., data-testid='approve-submission-button'

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google fonts 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' via Google Fonts link in index.html or import in CSS.
Update tailwind.config.js to set font-sans to Outfit and font-mono or a custom class to IBM Plex Sans.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the Governance Analytics dashboard (tight gaps, high density).
Use a strict high-contrast Swiss Brutalist UI: heavily rely on #FFFFFF backgrounds, #0A0A0A text, and 1px #E5E7EB borders. Customize Shadcn UI to have sharper corners (radius 0 or 0.25rem max).
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', 'Open Sans', or 'Syne' fonts for headings.

Build the 'AI Scoring Panel' (Claude evaluation) visually distinct: give it a dark retro-terminal feel (bg: #0A0A0A, text: #FFFFFF, accents: #002FA7) to contrast with the stark white dashboard. This gives the 'Agent' a unique personality.
Implement a clear, visible sidebar or top navigation bar with a solid background and hard border. Provide role-based mock routing.
Use Lucide-react for all icons, maintaining a consistent stroke width.
Inject the provided avatar URLs directly into the User Profile/Reviewer elements.
Ensure the CEO Escalation flows utilize the Destructive (#FF2400) color scheme to highlight the trap.
